pagesCreated.description: Public pay landing with ?token= query param. Server component that redirects to /pay/[token] if token present, renders empty state 'Link de pagamento invalido ou expirado' otherwise.
Public free-tools landing page. Honest empty state 'Em breve — ferramentas gratuitas' listing 4 planned tools. No newsletter form (no /api/newsletter exists).

pagesAlreadyReal.note: Thin wrapper but delegates to CookiePolicyPage (479 lines) with cookie-data.ts (244 lines) containing real cookie names (kloel_session, kloel_csrf, kloel_consent, cf_clearance, __stripe_mid, _ga, _fbp, tikTok _ttp, etc). NOT phantom.
Full LGPD/GDPR/CCPA privacy policy with 14 sections, Schema.org PrivacyPolicy, real company data, DPO contact, third-party table, retention table, Google/Meta API data usage disclosure. NOT phantom.
Full Terms of Service with 15 sections, Schema.org TermsOfService, Brazilian jurisdiction, account suspension, prohibited use clauses, WhatsApp/Meta compliance, liability disclaimer. NOT phantom.

footerFix: footer-minimal.tsx — replaced href='#' placeholders with real <Link href='/terms'> and <Link href='/privacy'>
summary: Mission inspection revealed only 2 of 5 claimed phantom pages were actually missing. Created (public)/pay/page.tsx (119 lines) and (public)/ferramentas/page.tsx (245 lines). The other 3 — /cookies, /privacy, /terms — already exist with substantial real content (9+479-page + 321-page + 194-page lines respectively) and proper metadata/SEO. Also fixed footer-minimal.tsx broken # hrefs. Typecheck and lint pass with exit 0. No commits or pushes performed.
